textByHashes.3788a34f49649ea90be6670894dc261960ed3a13: Another group left earlier. Without the Augur to guide them, they are lost.
textByHashes.886b06bea444993ce2a79234727566a2ce77a9a1: The Augur may be gone, but we remain. We must stay true to her teachings.
textByHashes.d31a4f8d37f25edb6482da788132374866594116: I can't believe the Augur is gone. I really thought she would lead us to the Final Dawn.
textByHashes.23fa3289290d8bd52c500f439212c22538aacc80: We become more fractured by the day. Earlier I heard someone claiming that Ennius and Furia weren't actually Ralos and Ranul reborn at all!
